rules: Minimum length: 12 characters
Must include uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols
Rotate passwords every 90 days
Prevent reuse of last 5 passwords
Store only hashed and salted credentials
Mandatory MFA for all admin and developer accounts
Support TOTP apps (Google Authenticator, Authy)
Enforce MFA for remote access and privileged actions
Role-based access defined in roles.json
Principle of least privilege enforced
Quarterly access reviews to remove stale accounts
Immediate revocation of access upon termination
Centralized logging of system events
Retain logs for minimum 12 months
Automated alerts for anomalies (failed logins, privilege escalation)
Regular review of logs by security analysts
Monthly patch cycle for OS and dependencies
Emergency patching within 48 hours of critical CVEs
Document all updates in patches.json
Test functionality post-update before production rollout
Encrypt sensitive data at rest (AES-256)
Enforce TLS 1.3 for data in transit
Regular backups stored securely offsite
Compliance with GDPR, POPIA, ISO27001
